mapper.select: SELECT s.ID, s.APPLY_ID, s.WORK_ORDER_NO, s.EQUIP_ID, s.MANT_APP_NUMBER, s.ACCEPTANCE_TIME, s.BUDGET_AMOUNT, s.ACTUAL_AMOUNT, e.EQUIP_NAME, m.DISPATCH_TYPE_NAME FROM E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY_SUB s LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON s.EQUIP_ID = e.ID AND e.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MAINT_INFO m ON s.WORK_ORDER_NO = m.WORK_ORDER_NO AND m.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE s.APPLY_ID = #{applyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY_SUB ( ID, APPLY_ID, WORK_ORDER_NO, EQUIP_ID, MANT_APP_NUMBER, ACCEPTANCE_TIME, BUDGET_AMOUNT, ACTUAL_AMOUNT ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{workOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{mantAppNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{budgetAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{actualAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY_SUB SET IS_APPROVAL_REJECT = #{isApprovalReject} WHERE APPLY_ID = #{applyId}
